<?php namespace Aws\MigrationHubConfig; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **AWS Migration Hub Config** service. * @method \Aws\Result createHomeRegionControl(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise createHomeRegionControlAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result deleteHomeRegionControl(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise deleteHomeRegionControlAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result describeHomeRegionControls(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise describeHomeRegionControlsAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result getHomeRegion(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise getHomeRegionAsync(array $args = []) */ class MigrationHubConfigClient extends AwsClient {}
